name: Page Stepper with Section Titles
summary: Multi-page form using Categorization with `variant: pages`, section titles, and nested object scopes
whenToUse: Large government application forms with distinct logical sections
When you want a task-list view with section groupings and progress tracking
notes: Use `options.variant: "pages"` for the Design System's preferred page stepper pattern
Use `options.variant: "stepper"` for the simple stepper (navigation bar at top)
Each Category becomes a page; `sectionTitle` groups categories into sections on the task list
For nested objects, scopes must use the full path: `#/properties/name/properties/firstName`
A Summary page is automatically appended by the GoA renderer for applicant review
Use `options.title` and `options.subtitle` on Categorization for the task list header
